decisions.title_en: Google to pay SpaceX $920M/month (~$30B) for GPU capacity at xAI data centers
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Google agrees to pay SpaceX ~$920M/month from Oct 2026-June 2029 (~$30B) for ~110k Nvidia GPUs hosted at xAI data centers, as bridge capacity for Gemini Enterprise (demand +300% QoQ).

decisions.title_en: Nvidia signs sweeping AI deals with South Korean giants during Huang's Seoul trip
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. June 8: SK hynix memory partnership, SK Telecom gigawatt AI cloud (2027), Naver/Doosan AI factories, LG humanoid robots, Hyundai autonomous + 'AI Valley' Saemangeum.

decisions.title_en: ChatGPT ads go live in the UK — first consumer ad rollout outside North America/ANZ
decisions.reason: Prior published 06-05 as 'openai-chatgpt-ads-manager' (advertiser-side Conversion-Optimized tooling). New development 06-06: consumer ads expand to UK — first market outside US/Australia/NZ; Japan/Korea/Brazil/Mexico next.

decisions.title_en: Enterprise AI contest moves 'beyond the model' to who owns the agentic runtime
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. This-week synthesis (June 7-8 analyses): Microsoft Agent 365/Windows, ServiceNow Action Fabric, Google Cloud, Snowflake CoWork/CoCo, Databricks all converging on the agentic client/runtime as the new battleground.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI adds ChatGPT 'Lockdown Mode' to blunt prompt-injection data exfiltration
decisions.reason: story_key not in lookback. Optional security setting limiting web/external-service access to reduce data exfiltration from prompt-injection attacks (release notes June 4).

decisions.title_en: More WWDC Siri details: custom 1.2T Gemini model, $1B/yr licensing
decisions.reason: Published 06-08 ('Tim Cook last WWDC, Siri redone, third-party models'). The 1.2T Gemini / $1B licensing figures are color on the same announcement, no substantive new development.

decisions.title_en: OpenAI Dreaming V3 memory: 82.8% recall, Plus/Pro US rollout
decisions.reason: Published 06-04 (openai-chatgpt-dreaming-memory). The 'V3' metrics (82.8% recall) and Plus/Pro US rollout describe the same June 4 launch, not a new development.
Published 06-03 (deepseek-74b-funding). No substantive new info; round still not closed; V4.1 not yet released.

decisions.title_en: Pentagon tests OpenAI/Google/xAI to replace Anthropic Claude ('too safe for war')
decisions.reason: Underlying break was 2026-05-21 (Bloomberg); June 8 TechTimes is a recap feature. event_date 19 days old (>5).

decisions.title_en: Cognition raises $1B at $26B valuation for Devin
Google DeepMind releases Gemma 4 12B encoder-free multimodal model
SoftBank weighs $100B IPO for AI-robotics spinout Roze
Nvidia invests in Murati's Thinking Machines; 1GW compute

decisions.reason: Skills 2026-05-18, Connectors 2026-05-06; >5 days. Grok agentic stack (Voice/Imagine/Build) already covered 06-04.

decisions.title_en: CDT taxonomy of 37 'dark patterns' in AI chatbots
decisions.reason: CDT report PDF dated 2026-05-28 (~12 days). Aggregators relisted it June 8 but the publication is >5 days old.
